usage: Stable prop, symbol, and costume-anchor locks for recurring visual continuity.

props.name: 半枚日月驿令
props.description: broken half-token made of worn bronze and old white stone inlay, one side shows partial sun wheel and missing moon edge, route notch along broken side
props.usage: opens partial old relay routes and identifies Shen family lineage
continuity_locks: always half, never complete in season 01
glow is short and broken
surface must be worn and scratched

props.name: 月白玉片
props.description: small moon-white jade shard carried by Yan Nanzhi, smooth edge on one side, broken ritual edge on the other
props.usage: reacts near old star charts and treaty platform
continuity_locks: stays with Yan Nanzhi
subtle glow only near old relics

props.name: 日月血牒残段
props.description: oil-paper wrapped strips of old treaty/bloodline text, red-brown seal lines and fine Sun-Moon pattern visible only when unfolded
props.usage: proves Yan Nanzhi's branch bloodline and points toward Moon Oath clues
continuity_locks: fragmented, never complete
kept hidden under coarse travel clothing

props.name: 清明白册
props.description: spotless white register book with insect-wax edge seal, black ink entries appearing or being written in cold formal script
props.usage: records suspected old blood, identifiers, and purge orders
continuity_locks: must be unnervingly clean
paired with Bai Yi or Qingming office

props.name: 虫蜡针
props.description: thin pale needle held in a small sterile tray, translucent insect-wax body, black dot at the tip
props.usage: bloodline screening and intimidation during inspection
continuity_locks: Bai Yi wipes it before use
not a huge weapon
medical cleanliness makes it frightening

props.name: 清明香
props.description: thin white smoke thread that clings low to fabric, doorframes, wells, and corridors; scent marker rather than visible spell cloud
props.usage: tracking fugitives and marking purge zones
continuity_locks: subtle white line, not thick fantasy fog
Bai Yi can read or smell it

props.name: 残缺大陆驿道图
props.description: torn old route map with relay marks, missing corners, smoky edge, route nodes that briefly shine when relay token is near
props.usage: guides route toward border wall and old relay network
continuity_locks: incomplete and hard to read
cannot reveal all geography at once

props.name: 月下盟书残页
props.description: partly burned old treaty page with multiple faction seals, moon-white fibers and dark scorch edge
props.usage: surviving proof after Bai Yi burns the main scroll
continuity_locks: fragment only
multi-faction seals must be visible
not a royal-only decree

props.name: 骨哨/骨笛
props.description: small bone whistle for Xue Linqiang, longer bone flute for Lu Mi; both have wind holes and weathered cord
palette: ice-blue accent for Lu Mi variant
props.usage: wind reading, border alarm, northern beast pact signal
continuity_locks: Xue's bone whistle and Lu Mi's bone flute are related but distinguishable

props.name: 边墙粮牌
props.description: dull yellow-gray stamped token used to exchange food at border wall, chipped and handled often
props.usage: shows Gray Wall survival economy and Sumin control
continuity_locks: ugly practical token, not coin treasure

props.name: 黑市通行木牌
props.description: small dark wood pass with scratched market sign and old route notch on the back
props.usage: Lu Qingli's access tool for wallfoot market and old route entry
continuity_locks: carved notch on back matters
belongs visually to Lu Qingli and wallfoot market

costume_anchors.description: gray-brown hunter clothing, worn leather wrist guards, charred hem after episode 02, practical short boots
coarse travel robe over hidden fine Sun-Moon patterned inner layer, southern red hair cord
spotless white official robe, thin translucent wing membrane mantle, small black sun insignia
Qingming white child robe, insect-wax wrist ring, childhood herb pouch or burned hair cord retained
coarse gray layers, repaired cloth, old iron, bone fasteners, snow dampness, no polished uniformity
